data.description: After upgrading to kno 0.16.1 on Manhattan, running kno doctor --fix in ~/knots repeatedly reports it fixed workflow_id_parity, but a follow-up kno doctor still shows: workflow_id_parity: ⚠ 1 knot(s) have a latest idx.knot_head event missing workflow_id; run doctor --fix to publish repair events. Need investigate whether doctor/fix is publishing an ineffective repair event, checking the wrong cache/index, or missing a specific knot/event edge case.
